compiled_state.title: Add planning.external_dependency_block_enabled to validate-config.sh KNOWN_KEYS
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Notes

Add the config key `planning.external_dependency_block_enabled` to the KNOWN_KEYS array in plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh. This prevents validate-config.sh from emitting "unknown key" errors when a project adds this flag to .claude/dso-config.conf.

Change is a single-line addition to the KNOWN_KEYS array under the appropriate section. The existing #-comment placement is under "# Preplanning" at the bottom of KNOWN_KEYS.

Add after existing `preplanning.interactive` entry:

    # Planning (external dependency block)
    planning.external_dependency_block_enabled

## TDD Requirement
No new RED test task needed. Rationale: KNOWN_KEYS is a static allowlist array — adding a recognized key does not change the validate-config.sh executable behavior for any other key. Existing test coverage (test-config-paths.sh) exercises the validator's recognized/unrecognized path; adding a new recognized key does not create a new behavioral code path. Exemption: Unit Test Exemption Criterion 1 (no conditional logic — KNOWN_KEYS is a list used in a loop; adding an entry changes which key is accepted, but does not add conditional branches).

Also add a .test-index entry mapping `plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh` to `tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh` so the test gate correctly links source to test.

## Acceptance Criteria

Universal:
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) after the change
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0) — no Python files modified
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null; true

Task-specific:
- [ ] planning.external_dependency_block_enabled appears in KNOWN_KEYS array in validate-config.sh
  Verify: grep -q "planning\.external_dependency_block_enabled" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh
- [ ] validate-config.sh exits 0 when config contains planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=false
  Verify: echo "planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=false" | bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh /dev/stdin; echo "exit:$?"
- [ ] validate-config.sh still exits 1 for truly unknown keys (no regression)
  Verify: echo "unknown.mystery_key=foo" | bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh /dev/stdin 2>&1 | grep -q "unknown key\|unrecognized"
- [ ] .test-index updated: plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh mapped to tests/hooks/test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard.sh
  Verify: grep -q "validate-config\.sh.*test-implementation-plan-manual-tag-guard" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: AC amendment (Gap Analysis): T1 (f7c6-5c7b) must be committed before T2 edits .test-index to prevent concurrent edit conflict. Both tasks add .test-index entries — parallel execution risks a last-writer-wins overwrite. Dependency T2 → T1 added. Acceptance criteria: verify T1 is merged before committing T2's .test-index change (Verify: git log --oneline | grep -q f7c6-5c7b).
comments.author: Test
